available: API.md - API reference with TypeScript signatures
ARCHITECTURE.md - System overview and module organization
SCHEMA.md - Data models and type definitions

key_patterns_identified: Foundation docs are projections of .coderef data
UUID-based traceability between docs and code
gaps_and_risks: Currently using only ~10% of .coderef data in docs
Line numbers in docs are stale (3+ months old)
Complexity scores not surfaced in docs

data_inventory.index.json: 390 KB, 1,921 elements with UUIDs, params, async flags

1_executive_summary.purpose: Create new foundation documentation files (INDEX.md, RELATIONSHIPS.md, EXPORTS.md, HOTSPOTS.md) and enhance existing docs (API.md, COMPONENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, SCHEMA.md) by leveraging data from .coderef/index.json, graph.json, and context.json. Build auto-generation pipeline to keep docs synchronized with codebase.
1_executive_summary.value_proposition: Transform static foundation docs into living documentation that auto-populates from .coderef scan data, providing traceability, relationship maps, and complexity analysis for developers
1_executive_summary.real_world_analogy: Similar to building foundation-docs-index-integration - systematically implementing each requirement to deliver complete functionality
1_executive_summary.use_case: User requests foundation-docs-index-integration → System implements: Create INDEX.md as human-browsable element registry from index.json, Create RELATIONSHIPS.md visualizing dependency graphs from graph.json edges, Create EXPORTS.md documenting public API surface (781 exported elements) → Feature is functional
1_executive_summary.output: Implemented 10 requirements: Create INDEX.md as human-browsable element registry from index.json, Create RELATIONSHIPS.md visualizing dependency graphs from graph.json edges, Create EXPORTS.md documenting public API surface (781 exported elements)

3_current_state_analysis.architecture_context: Standard implementation following existing project architecture and patterns

primary_features: Create INDEX.md as human-browsable element registry from index.json
Create RELATIONSHIPS.md visualizing dependency graphs from graph.json edges
Create EXPORTS.md documenting public API surface (781 exported elements)
Create HOTSPOTS.md merging complexity scores from context.json
Enhance API.md with live parameter tables from index.json
secondary_features: Enhance COMPONENTS.md with complexity badges and UUID links
Enhance ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagrams from graph.json
Create doc generation scripts (Node.js) for auto-regeneration
Add UUID anchor comments to markdown for traceability
Validate docs match index.json (CI gate script)

tasks: SETUP-001: Create scripts/ directory and setup doc generation infrastructure
SETUP-002: Create shared utilities for reading .coderef JSON files
LOGIC-001: Generate INDEX.md - master element registry from index.json
LOGIC-002: Generate RELATIONSHIPS.md - dependency visualizer from graph.json
LOGIC-003: Generate EXPORTS.md - public API surface (781 exported elements)
LOGIC-004: Generate HOTSPOTS.md - complexity & risk analysis from context.json
ENHANCE-001: Update API.md with UUID anchors and live parameter tables
ENHANCE-002: Update COMPONENTS.md with complexity badges and file density metrics
ENHANCE-003: Update ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagrams from graph.json
ENHANCE-004: Update SCHEMA.md with auto-generated type statistics
SCRIPT-004: Create validate-docs.js CI gate script
TEST-001: Verify all 4 new docs generate correctly
TEST-002: Verify enhanced docs contain UUID anchors
DOC-001: Create README for doc generation scripts
FINAL-001: Run full regeneration and verify outputs

edge_case_scenarios.setup: Call function with None or empty string
edge_case_scenarios.expected_behavior: Function validates input and returns appropriate error
edge_case_scenarios.verification: Assert error message and status code

edge_case_scenarios.setup: Call function with malformed or incorrect data type
edge_case_scenarios.expected_behavior: Function validates input type and returns error
edge_case_scenarios.verification: Assert error message indicates invalid format

edge_case_scenarios.setup: Test with minimum and maximum allowed values
edge_case_scenarios.verification: Assert results are within expected range
edge_case_scenarios.error_handling: No error expected for valid boundaries

recommendations: Review high-complexity elements before making changes
Consider breaking down functions with score >10 into smaller units
Add comprehensive tests for critical-risk elements
Use dependency injection to reduce coupling in complex classes
